labels: requirement, needs-testing

<!-- One sentence: what is this feature/change? -->

<!-- Each line = one thing that must be true for this to be "done" -->

- `POST /api/...`

## 🚫 Out of Scope
<!-- What should NOT be tested in this ticket -->

## 📎 Designs / References
<!-- Figma links, screenshots, related PRs -->

- [ ] P0 — Blocker
- [ ] P1 — High
